original_prompt: Seamlessly integrated into the provided background scene, occupying the lower-left foreground is Pelé, a Man, dressed in a Green long-sleeved button-up shirt, holding a Fitus mascot. Positioned in the upper-right, slightly above and to the right of Pelé, is Frida Kahlo, a Woman, wearing a Bright pink crop top and blue denim shorts, holding an iPhone; her head touches Pelé's. entities.description: Pelé, a Man, is seamlessly integrated into the background scene, dressed in a Green long-sleeved button-up shirt and holding a Fitus mascot, positioned in the lower-left foreground.
Frida Kahlo, a Woman, is positioned in the upper-right, slightly above and to the right of Pelé, wearing a Bright pink crop top and blue denim shorts, holding an iPhone; her head touches Pelé's.

Gregor Mendel, a Child, is anchored in the lower-right foreground, slightly right of Pelé and lower-right of Frida Kahlo, wearing a white student Ao Dai; his head also touches both Pelé's and Frida Kahlo's, and he is looking at Pelé.
